task_completion.description: Dashboard is created and named correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Graphite dashboard title at the top of the screen is exactly 'Zombie Decommissioning'.

task_completion.description: Graph 1: Lowest CPU Instances is configured correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph is present with the title 'Lowest CPU Instances'. The legend or graph data should show exactly 2 series (lines), representing the instances with the lowest CPU utilization.

task_completion.description: Graph 2: Cumulative Disk Activity is configured correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph is present with the title 'Cumulative Disk Activity'. The graph lines should generally trend upwards (indicating a cumulative sum), and the legend must display just the instance names (e.g., 'ec2_instance_1') instead of the full metric path.

task_completion.description: Graph 3: Idle Capacity Percentage is configured correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph is present with the title 'Idle Capacity Percentage'. The legend must show the exact label 'Idle CPU %' for the series.

There is visual confirmation that the dashboard has been saved, such as a 'Dashboard saved' notification, the save icon indicating a saved state, or the dashboard name appearing in the URL/saved dashboards list.

integrity.description: Agent used the Graphite Web UI to build the dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Graphite Web interface with metric composer and graph configuration dialogs, rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying JSON files.
The graphs in the Graphite UI display actual plotted lines and data points, showing that the metrics were successfully queried from the backend.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of text editors containing the expected dashboard name or graph titles as a shortcut.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard name is exactly 'Zombie Decommissioning'. The three required graph titles are exactly 'Lowest CPU Instances', 'Cumulative Disk Activity', and 'Idle Capacity Percentage'.
